cast.name: São José Correia São José Correia

this_title: Até Que a Vida Nos Separe
introduction: Raquel, a 42-year-old woman gets involved with Henrique, an 18-year-old boy, son of her husband's boss. The relationship lasts only three days, but the consequences will be remarkable and when he begins to have a relationship with Patrícia, Raquel's daughter, Henrique's bad nature will lead the young boy to a tragic and irreversible end. And the lives of Raquel and her family will never be the same.
foreign_title: Até Que a Vida Nos Separe
